mapper.select: SELECT MENU_NO , MENU_NAME , PRICE , DECODE(SOLD_OUT, 'N', '주문가능', 'Y', '품절') AS soldOut FROM MENU WHERE REST_NO = #{restNo} ORDER BY MENU_NO
SELECT REST_NO , REST_NAME , CATEGORY , MIN_PRICE , DELIVERY_FEE FROM RESTAURANT ORDER BY REST_NO
SELECT REST_NO restNo , TRUNC(AVG(REVIEW_STAR),1) avgStar FROM REVIEW JOIN MENU USING(REST_NO) JOIN ORDERS USING(MENU_NO) GROUP BY REST_NO
